title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 24. SUPPORT AND SERVICE ANIMAL INTEGRITY ACT

§1971. Short title

            This Chapter shall be cited as the "Louisiana Support and Service Animal Integrity Act".

            Acts 2024, No. 558, §1.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 24.  SUPPORT AND SERVICE ANIMAL INTEGRITY ACT
§1971.  Short title
This Chapter shall be cited as the "Louisiana Support and Service Animal
Integrity Act".
Acts 2024, No. 558, §1.
